'''hodhachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hueless|hueless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-dh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hueless|hueless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hodhachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hodhachithi|hodhachithi]] || [[word:hodhachiji|hodhachiji]] || [[word:hodhachishi|hodhachishi]] || [[word:hodhachiki|hodhachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hodhachuthuthu|hodhachuthuthu]] || [[word:hodhachujuju|hodhachujuju]] || [[word:hodhachushushu|hodhachushushu]] || [[word:hodhachukuku|hodhachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hodhachuthu|hodhachuthu]] || [[word:hodhachuju|hodhachuju]] || [[word:hodhachushu|hodhachushu]] || [[word:hodhachuku|hodhachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hodhachufthuf|hodhachufthuf]] || [[word:hodhachufjuf|hodhachufjuf]] || [[word:hodhachufshuf|hodhachufshuf]] || [[word:hodhachufkuf|hodhachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hodhachethe|hodhachethe]] || [[word:hodhacheje|hodhacheje]] || [[word:hodhacheshe|hodhacheshe]] || [[word:hodhacheke|hodhacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hodhachothotho|hodhachothotho]] || [[word:hodhachojojo|hodhachojojo]] || [[word:hodhachoshosho|hodhachoshosho]] || [[word:hodhachokoko|hodhachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hodhachotho|hodhachotho]] || [[word:hodhachojo|hodhachojo]] || [[word:hodhachosho|hodhachosho]] || [[word:hodhachoko|hodhachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hodhachofthof|hodhachofthof]] || [[word:hodhachofjof|hodhachofjof]] || [[word:hodhachofshof|hodhachofshof]] || [[word:hodhachofkof|hodhachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfthĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfjĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfshĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfkĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfthĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfjĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfshĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfkĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfthĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfjĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfshĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hodhachĂŻfkĂŻf|hodhachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hodhachĂŠthĂŠ|hodhachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:hodhachĂŠjĂŠ|hodhachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:hodhachĂŠshĂŠ|hodhachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:hodhachĂŠkĂŠ|hodhachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hodhachathatha|hodhachathatha]] || [[word:hodhachajaja|hodhachajaja]] || [[word:hodhachashasha|hodhachashasha]] || [[word:hodhachakaka|hodhachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hodhachatha|hodhachatha]] || [[word:hodhachaja|hodhachaja]] || [[word:hodhachasha|hodhachasha]] || [[word:hodhachaka|hodhachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hodhachafthaf|hodhachafthaf]] || [[word:hodhachafjaf|hodhachafjaf]] || [[word:hodhachafshaf|hodhachafshaf]] || [[word:hodhachafkaf|hodhachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hodhachasha|hodhachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hodhachshĂ«sha|hodhachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hodhachrosha|hodhachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hodhachmusha|hodhachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hodhachyasha|hodhachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohodhachnkshĂ«sha|gohodhachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohodhachnkrosha|gohodhachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohodhachnkmusha|gohodhachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohodhachnkyasha|gohodhachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hodhadhachasha|hodhadhachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hodhadhachshĂ«sha|hodhadhachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hodhadhachrosha|hodhadhachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hodhadhachmusha|hodhadhachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hodhadhachyasha|hodhadhachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohodhadhachnkshĂ«sha|gohodhadhachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohodhadhachnkrosha|gohodhadhachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohodhadhachnkmusha|gohodhadhachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohodhadhachnkyasha|gohodhadhachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hedhĂŠchasha|hedhĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hedhĂŠchshĂ«sha|hedhĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hedhĂŠchrosha|hedhĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hedhĂŠchmusha|hedhĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hedhĂŠchyasha|hedhĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohedhĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gohedhĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohedhĂŠchnkrosha|gohedhĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohedhĂŠchnkmusha|gohedhĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohedhĂŠchnkyasha|gohedhĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hodhfachasha|hodhfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hodhfachshĂ«sha|hodhfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hodhfachrosha|hodhfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hodhfachmusha|hodhfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hodhfachyasha|hodhfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohodhfachnkshĂ«sha|gohodhfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohodhfachnkrosha|gohodhfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohodhfachnkmusha|gohodhfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohodhfachnkyasha|gohodhfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
